summary: Iteration 29 - PCM Permissions (Bloco 1) VALIDATED. Backend: 14/14 pytest PASS — PCM can list OS, create OS, edit OS priority (verified persistence via GET), kanban-move to 'planejada', list inspecoes, edit inspecao, and export OS Excel; PCM correctly receives 403 on iniciar/concluir/pausar/delete OS and on iniciar/concluir/delete inspecao. Frontend (Playwright as pcm@manutrix.com): /os list view shows 16 edit-os-* buttons and 0 delete-os-* buttons; on /os/{id} detail page the os-iniciar-btn, os-concluir-btn, os-pausar-btn data-testids are absent AND no buttons matching 'Iniciar OS' / 'Concluir OS' / 'Pausar' text are rendered; on /inspecoes/{id} the inspecao-iniciar-btn and inspecao-concluir-btn are absent AND no 'Iniciar Inspe…' / 'Concluir Inspe…' text-buttons render — only the 'Em Andamento' status badge is shown. Sidebar identifies the user as 'Tessio PCM / Pcm'. OS audit trail confirms PCM-driven kanban transition: 'OS #2026-00098 → planejada · Tessio PCM (pcm)'. All 18 acceptance criteria PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/routes/work_orders.py:214 — delete_os calls check_admin_only — PCM correctly blocked ✓
backend/routes/work_orders.py:225/236/266 — iniciar/pausar/concluir restrict to ['admin','supervisor','tecnico'] — PCM blocked ✓
backend/server.py:927 — delete_inspecao restricted to ['admin','supervisor'] — PCM blocked ✓
backend/server.py:940/959 — iniciar/concluir_inspecao restricted to ['admin','supervisor','tecnico'] — PCM blocked ✓
Frontend App.js view-list at line 2980 — list view exposes edit-os-* and delete-os-* via data-testid (delete hidden for non-admin); PCM sees 16/16 edits and 0 deletes as expected
test_credentials: pcm@manutrix.com/pcm123 — works; role='pcm' confirmed in JWT/user payload. admin@manutrix.com/admin123 — works (used to seed Ativos/OS list for fixtures).
seed_data_creation: One OS created by PCM during test: titulo='TEST_PCM_CREATE_OS_iter29' on ativo AV-01, then edited to prioridade='alta' and kanban-moved to 'planejada'. Inspection used existing record (PUT observacoes='TEST_PCM_EDIT iter29').
context_for_next_testing_agent: PCM RBAC fully implemented and verified at backend (routes/work_orders.py + server.py inspecoes endpoints) and frontend (App.js conditional buttons). To run regression: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://procure-manutrix.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration29_pcm_permissions.py -v`. Playwright tip: UI form fill is flaky in this preview; bypass by POSTing /api/auth/login with page.request.post then injecting sessionStorage keys 'manutrix_token' and 'manutrix_user' (NOT 'access_token'/'user') — confirmed at App.js:5862-5863. Use [data-testid='view-list'] on /os to switch from Kanban (default) to List view where edit-os-* and delete-os-* render.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 14 backend assertions and 4 frontend UI assertions for PCM permissions in Bloco 1 PASS as designed.
